title: Mademoiselle
actors: Jeanne Moreau, Ettore Manni, Umberto Orsini
plot: Residents of a small French town are quick to accuse Manou of arson because he seduced most of the town's women. No one suspects the real culprit, a woman committing random crimes, all in an attempt to draw Manou's attention to he...
